info.title: Char AI API
info.description: AI services API for speech-to-text transcription, LLM chat completions, and subscription management

200.description: Claimed shared note with a retryable attachment lease

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description:
STT provider. Use 'hyprnote' for automatic routing (default), or specify:
deepgram, soniox, assemblyai, gladia, elevenlabs, fireworks, openai, dashscope, mistral

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model to use for transcription (provider-specific, e.g. 'nova-3')

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: BCP-47 language hint (e.g. 'en', 'ko', 'ja'). Multiple values or comma-separated supported

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.description: Keyword boosting. Comma-separated or repeated query params

parameters.name: num_speakers
parameters.description: Expected exact number of speakers, when supported by the selected provider

parameters.name: min_speakers
parameters.description: Minimum expected number of speakers, when supported by the selected provider

parameters.name: max_speakers
parameters.description: Maximum expected number of speakers, when supported by the selected provider

parameters.name: encoding
parameters.description: Audio encoding: linear16, flac, mulaw, opus, ogg-opus, etc.

101.description: WebSocket upgrade. Server sends StreamResponse JSON messages.

400.description: Bad request (invalid provider, missing params, etc.)

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description:
STT provider. Use 'hyprnote' for automatic routing (default), or specify:
deepgram, soniox, assemblyai, gladia, elevenlabs, fireworks, openai, dashscope, mistral

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model to use for transcription (provider-specific, e.g. 'nova-3')

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: BCP-47 language hint (e.g. 'en', 'ko', 'ja'). Multiple values or comma-separated supported

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.description: Keyword boosting. Comma-separated or repeated query params

parameters.name: num_speakers
parameters.description: Expected exact number of speakers, when supported by the selected provider

parameters.name: min_speakers
parameters.description: Minimum expected number of speakers, when supported by the selected provider

parameters.name: max_speakers
parameters.description: Maximum expected number of speakers, when supported by the selected provider

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: When set, enables async callback mode. Body should be JSON with a `url` field instead of raw audio

requestBody.description: Raw audio bytes (sync mode) or JSON `{ "url": "<file_id>" }` (callback mode)

400.description: Bad request (empty body, invalid provider, etc.)

200.description: Backup deletion scheduled behind a dependency fence

403.description: Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required

409.description: Backup changed, deletion was canceled, or a dependency appeared

200.description: Exact deletion request canceled or durably prevented

403.description: Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required

409.description: Backup changed or deletion is already being collected

200.description: Short-lived download for the server-current backup

403.description: Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required
Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required

409.description: Uploaded object does not match its reservation

403.description: Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required
Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required
Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required

200.description: Time-limited grant for an immutable backup upload

400.description: Invalid object key or ciphertext hash

403.description: Anarlog Pro subscription or backup access required

409.description: Backup state or ciphertext hash conflict
Account already uses a different recovery key
Legacy witness requires an established device
Uploaded object does not match the reservation

503.description: Shared attachment verification capacity is busy

403.description: Anarlog Pro or share-manager access required

409.description: Shared note changed since the supplied base revision
Shared note changed since the supplied base revision

key.description: Short identifier. GitHub: "owner/repo", Linear: team key (e.g., "ENG").

name.description: Display name. GitHub: "owner/repo", Linear: team name.

resolution.description: Resolution of the confidence scores. Value is number of seconds per sample

score.description: List of confidence scores for each sample. Values are between 0 and 100

createdAt.description: Date and time the job was created

jobId.description: Job ID to track the progress or get the results

updatedAt.description: Date and time the job was last updated

exclusiveDiarization.description: Exclusive diarization segments where only one speaker is active at a time. Only returned if `exclusive` is set to true when job is created.

turnLevelTranscription.description: Turn-level (speaker turn) transcription segments with text. Only returned if `transcription` is set to true when job is created.

wordLevelTranscription.description: Word-level transcription segments with text. Only returned if `transcription` is set to true when job is created.

confidence.description: Confidence scores that this speech turn matches each diarization speaker. Only available if `turnLevelConfidence` is set to true when job is created.

end.description: End time of the segment in seconds

start.description: Start time of the segment in seconds

items.description: List of jobs. Sorted by creation date, descending. Does not include output data.

url.description: The url should be in the form media://object-key where the object-key can be any alpha-numeric string. The object-key is unique to your account API token so there is no risk of collision with other users.

exclusiveDiarization.description: Exclusive diarization segments where only one speaker is active at a time. Only returned if `exclusive` is set to true when job is created.

confidence.description: Confidence scores that this speech turn matches each diarization speaker. Only available if `turnLevelConfidence` is set to true when job is created.

end.description: End time of the segment in seconds

match.description: Label of the voiceprint that was identified following the matching settings

start.description: Start time of the segment in seconds

confidence.description: Confidence for each speaker label, as a dictionary of speaker label to confidence score

match.description: Label of the voiceprint that was identified following the matching settings

createdAt.description: Date and time the job was created

jobId.description: Job ID to track the progress or get the results

updatedAt.description: Date and time the job was last updated

raw.description: Raw provider JSON for forward compatibility.

state_detail.description: Provider's original state string for display (e.g. "In Review", "merged").

end.description: End time of the segment in seconds

start.description: Start time of the segment in seconds

text.description: The transcribed speech content for this segment

createdAt.description: Date and time the job was created

jobId.description: Job ID to track the progress or get the results

updatedAt.description: Date and time the job was last updated

voiceprint.description: Voiceprint of the audio. To be used for identification

tags.name: pyannote
tags.description: Pyannote speaker diarization and voice processing
